# pip-audit ignore list (nousergon/alpha-engine-config#2342)
# Every entry below MUST carry a dated rationale comment directly above it.
# No blanket suppression — each accepted advisory is named individually.
# Format:
#   # <rationale> — accepted 2026-07-12, revisit <YYYY-MM-DD or "when a fix is released">
#   <VULN-ID>
#
# 2026-07-12: pip-audit against the full resolved dependency set in
# requirements.txt (89 packages, direct + transitive) reported zero known
# vulnerabilities. No entries are needed at this time. This file exists so
# ci.yml's Security audit step has something to read; the first future
# finding that can't be safely bumped should be added here individually,
# with its own dated rationale, per the format above.
